'''Yondalla''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] working for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. She resided in [[Wayfar/Legends|Wayfar]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], near [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. When one of Jabba's top [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]], [[Imo Vledmo|S'lee]], was arrested by [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]], she was given the task of finding someone who could break him out of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] en route to [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. Once it docked, S'lee was to be traded to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] for a CorSec officer. It was important to Jabba that S'lee not end up with the Imperials, as he was afraid S'lee would talk.
